signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI inflation rises to 2.16% YoY | NO new breaking announcement today | LOW confidence**  
No confirmed announcements, resolutions, or updates on South Korea's annual inflation reported today (April 17, 2026) that would move prediction markets; the most recent data is March 2026 CPI at 2.16% YoY (up from 2.00% in February), released April 2, 2026.[2]

signals.raw:
I cannot provide the breaking news and real-time trader commentary you're requesting based on the available search results.
